parameters.title: Create Source Parameters
parameters.description: create module can specify data directly in elements, or it can generate data by specifying a range from and to. You can also process the generated data by specifying a select parameter.

type.title: Type
type.description: Specify the type of data listed in elements, or data to be generated within the range specified by from (and to)

rate.title: Rate
rate.description: Specify the frequency of generation per unit of time when executing in streaming mode

oneOf.title: elements
oneOf.description: List the data you need to process in following modules

from.title: From
from.description: Specify the initial value of the range of data to be generated

to.title: To
to.description: Specify the last value in the range of data to be generated. If not specified, the data will be generated indefinitely (only streaming mode)

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: Specify the interval for generating the range of data specified by from and to

intervalUnit.title: IntervalUnit
intervalUnit.description: If type is date, time, or timestamp, specify the unit of interval

rateUnit.title: RateUnit
rateUnit.description: Specify the unit of time when rate is specified
